paper_title: Beyond Static Leaderboards: Predictive Validity for the Evaluation of LLM Agents

source.note: Full paper extracted via HTML parsing (70,500 chars raw, 64,525 chars structured text)

artifacts.description: Main deep-read report: ~25 anchored sections covering problem, position, three critiques, 12-tier apparatus, PV criteria, 14 studies, convergence patterns, falsification thresholds, limitations, and claim index

Claim-level traceability: 11 claims with evidence quotes, sources, and support levels (convergent_architectural_sensitivity, convergent_empirical, theoretical_with_empirical_backing, proposal, analytical_synthesis)
Problem reconstruction via research equation (before → after), tri-pass notes (first/second/third pass), challenge-to-module mapping with evidence gaps, key concepts, and related work clusters

10 ranked research direction seeds with seed_type, trigger_evidence, hidden_assumption, MVE, killer objection, and killer result. Top seeds: PV weight fitting, MCP-stdio overhead, tier orthogonality, cross-domain transfer, deployment validity gap
